title: Answering and Asking Questions
learningGoal: The learner will successfully draft a short 50-150 word English response addressing specific WH- questions, spelling out numerical ages, and formulating at least one structurally inverted English question.
instructions: Your new English friend has sent you a message with three questions: 1) What is your name? 2) How old are you? 3) What day is today? Write a paragraph answering these questions. Use the full word for your age, not the number (e.g., 'Twenty', not '20'). Finally, ask your friend ONE question using 'Who', 'What', 'Where', or 'When'.

contentItems.text: Remember to flip the Verb and Subject for your question! (e.g., 'Are you...' instead of 'You are...')

writingPrompt: Write a reply message answering your friend's 3 questions, and ending with 1 question of your own.
promptGoal: Demonstrate comprehension of WH-questions, accurate numerical spelling, date capitalization, and interrogative sentence inversion.
referenceHints: To answer 'What is your name?': My name is [Name].
To answer 'How old are you?': I am [number written out] years old.
To answer 'What day is today?': Today is [Day]. Capitalize the Day!
To ask a question: Start with Where/What/When/Who, then flip the verb (e.g., Where ARE YOU?).

modelExampleOutputs.targetText: Hello! My name is Rahul. I am twenty-two years old. Today is Monday. I am very happy to meet you. Where are you from?
modelExampleOutputs.transliteration: हेलो! माई नेम इज़ राहुल। आई एम ट्वेंटी-टू इयर्स ओल्ड। टुडे इज़ मंडे। आई एम वेरी हैप्पी टू मीट यू। वेयर आर यू फ्रॉम?
modelExampleOutputs.baseTranslation: नमस्ते! मेरा नाम राहुल है। मैं बाईस वर्ष का हूँ। आज सोमवार है। मुझे आपसे मिलकर बहुत खुशी हुई। आप कहाँ से हैं?
modelExampleOutputs.annotation: Perfect score. Spells out 'twenty-two', capitalizes 'Monday', answers all 3 prompts, and successfully forms an inverted WH-question at the end.

modelExampleOutputs.targetText: Hi. My name is Priya. I am thirty years old. Today is Friday. How are you?
modelExampleOutputs.transliteration: हाय। माई नेम इज़ प्रिया। आई एम थर्टी इयर्स ओल्ड। टुडे इज़ फ्राइडे। हाउ आर यू?
modelExampleOutputs.baseTranslation: नमस्ते। मेरा नाम प्रिया है। मैं तीस वर्ष की हूँ। आज शुक्रवार है। आप कैसे हैं?
modelExampleOutputs.annotation: Acceptable. Very simple structure but technically fulfills every rule and constraint perfectly.

evaluationCriteria.description: Did the user provide their name, age (spelled out), and today's day?
Did the user ask a valid question ending in a question mark? Was the Verb correctly placed before the Subject? (e.g., 'Are you' instead of 'You are').
Are Days of the week capitalized? Is the numerical age spelled via alphabet rather than digits?

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: Hi, my name is Sara. I am twenty-five years old. Today is Wednesday. Where are you from?
acceptableAlternates: My name is Amit. I am thirty years old. Today is Friday. What is your favorite day?
adminCorrectAnswerSet.grammarBaseline: Must include an inverted interrogative sentence structure and capitalized weekday.

feedbackRules.onPass: Magnificent! You correctly synthesized answers to English prompts and successfully fired back a natively structured question.
feedbackRules.onFail: Keep practicing! Ensure you write out your age in letters (e.g. 'twenty' not '20'). Look at your question: did you write 'Where you are?' Remember to flip it to 'Where ARE YOU?'.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good start! You answered the questions well, but you might have forgotten to use a capital letter for the Day of the Week, or you forgot the question mark '?' at the end.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: Write a reply answering Name, Age, and Day. End with a question.

hintText: To ask a question easily, build the normal sentence first: 'You are happy'. Then flip the first two words: 'Are you happy?'. Add a WH word if you want: 'Why are you happy?'
commonMistakes: Writing 'I am 20 years old' instead of 'I am twenty years old'.
Writing 'What your name is?' instead of 'What is your name?'.
